{{Quote|I'd know Jedi Knight Alicka's muffins anywhere. This must mean that—|Anakin Skywalker|<ref name="TOTJ" />}}
'''Alicka''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The Knight was known for making [[blumfruit muffin]]s and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] was instantly able to identify some crumbs as belonging to one of Alicka's muffins while searching for the missing Jedi [[Wren Honoran]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ragoon VI]]<ref name="TOTJ" /> in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'' to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The character was mentioned in ''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'', a young readers novel written by [[Jude Watson]] and published in [[2002]].<ref name="TOTJ" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'' {{Ab|Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi (audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
